SFDC_EXT_STORE_LOCATOR.name: Store Locator
SFDC_EXT_STORE_LOCATOR.description: Store Locator allows a shopper to find the closest store to them.

SFDC_EXT_BOPIS.name: Buy Online Pickup In Store
SFDC_EXT_BOPIS.description: Buy Online Pickup In Store allows a shopper to pick up their order at a store. Requires the Store Locator and Multiship extensions to be installed.

SFDC_EXT_MULTISHIP.name: Multiship
SFDC_EXT_MULTISHIP.description: Multiship allows shoppers to ship items to multiple different addresses in a single order.

SFDC_EXT_INTERNAL_THEME_SWITCHER.name: Theme Switcher
SFDC_EXT_INTERNAL_THEME_SWITCHER.description: Theme Switcher allows a developer to switch the theme of the store.
